scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:api && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:perf:smoke: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('k6/results',{recursive:true})" && k6 run --env TEST_PROFILE=smoke --summary-export k6/results/wordmaster-smoke-summary.json k6/wordmaster-multiplayer.js
scripts.test:perf:load: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('k6/results',{recursive:true})" && k6 run --env TEST_PROFILE=load --summary-export k6/results/wordmaster-load-summary.json k6/wordmaster-multiplayer.js
scripts.test:perf:stress: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('k6/results',{recursive:true})" && k6 run --env TEST_PROFILE=stress --summary-export k6/results/wordmaster-stress-summary.json k6/wordmaster-multiplayer.js
scripts.test:security: npm run test:security:abuse && npm run test:security:zap
